channel.title: Game Director on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Game Director on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: My Ideas That Got Rejected
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about my ideas that got rejected from my own games, and I’m going to start all the way back with Fallout, which was now what?

item.title: Definitions Are Hard (aka Why A Game Director Is Necessary)
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about how definitions are hard and I’m going to subtitle this — why game director is necessary.

item.title: Game Flavor
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about game flavor, and I’m deliberately doing this on a Friday, Funday, because what I’m going to talk about is very subjective.

item.title: High Level Design Direction
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today, I want to talk about highlevel design Direction.

item.title: Why I Directed One Last Time
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about why I directed one last time and specifically what I mean by that is why I stepped up to be a game director on The Outer Worlds, even after I said I wi it.

item.title: Ego And Game Directors
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about ego and game directors and how those two things often seem conflated in people’s minds and I want to talk about.

item.title: How To Be A Good Game Director, Part 2
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to do a part two about being a game director, and I’ll put the part one Link in the description.

item.title: Design Pillars
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about design pillars.

item.title: How To Be A Good Game Director
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about what it’s like to be a game director now.
